instruction:
Complete a verifiable beach footprint artistic enhancement workflow using the image at /home/user/Desktop/memorycatcher-footprint-347817_1920.jpg. Each step produces measurable, verifiable outputs:

1. Create a new layer named exactly 'Footprint_Select' above the background. Use the Free Select tool (Lasso) to carefully trace around the footprint shape. Copy the selection to this new layer and hide the original background layer.

2. Create a new layer named exactly 'Sand_Texture' below 'Footprint_Select'. Fill it with solid color #c2b280 (sand beige) to create a clean sand background.

3. Create a new layer named exactly 'Footprint_Shadow' above 'Footprint_Select'. Use the selection from step 1, fill it with black, then apply Gaussian Blur with exactly 15px radius. Move the shadow 10px down and 10px right, then set layer opacity to exactly 40%.

4. Create a new layer named exactly 'Footprint_Glow' above 'Footprint_Shadow'. Use the selection from step 1, fill it with color #87ceeb (sky blue), apply Gaussian Blur with exactly 20px radius, and set layer blending mode to 'Screen' with opacity 50%.

5. Create a new layer named exactly 'Decor_Shells' above 'Footprint_Glow'. Use the Brush tool to add exactly 3 decorative elements around the footprint: a star shape (5px, color #ff69b4) at top-left, a circle (4px, color #ffa500) at top-right, and a heart shape (5px, color #ff1493) at bottom-center.

6. Create a new layer named exactly 'Vignette' at the top of the layer stack. Use the Elliptical Select tool to create an oval covering 80% of the image from center, apply Select > Feather with 60px radius, invert selection, and fill with black at 30% opacity.

7. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Title' at the top-center with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'SUMMER MEMORIES'
   - Font size: 32px
   - Color: #ffffff (white)
   - Position: centered horizontally, 25px from top edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Title'

8. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Date' at the bottom-center with these exact specifications:
   - Content: '2024'
   - Font size: 24px
   - Color: #ffd700 (gold)
   - Position: centered horizontally, 20px from bottom edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Date'

9. Create a new layer named exactly 'Frame' at the very top. Use Select > All, then Edit > Stroke Selection with a 8px solid color #deb887 (burlywood) to create a border around the entire image.

10. Export the final image as 'beach_footprint_art.jpg' with exact specifications: JPEG format, width 1200 pixels (height auto), quality 90. Save the project as 'footprint_project.xcf' with all layers preserved.
